title: distephanus quartziticola
intro: Distephanus quartziticola is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Distephanus quartziticola are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
